text.en: This ability is described in full in the Army Rules section of *Codex: Space Marines*.

■ If an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Marneus Calgar has both the **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** and **ULTRAMARINES** Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Ultramarines Chapter.

■ You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army.

■ If your army includes one or more **BLACK TEMPLARS** units, it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES PSYKER** models, and cannot include any of the following models that do not have the Black Templars keyword: **GLADIATOR LANCER**; **GLADIATOR REAPER**; **GLADIATOR VALIANT**; **IMPULSOR**; **REPULSOR**; **REPULSOR EXECUTIONER**.

■ If your army includes one or more **SPACE WOLVES** units, it cannot include any of the following units: **APOTHECARY**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**.

**DEATHWATCH**

■ Your army can include **ADEPTUS ASTARTES DEATHWATCH** units, but it cannot include any **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units drawn from any other Chapter.
■ With the exception of **KILL TEAM CASSIUS** (see *Legends: Agents of the Imperium*), your army cannot include any **AGENTS OF THE IMPERIUM DEATHWATCH** units.
■ Your army cannot include any of the following units: **ASSAULT SQUAD**; **ASSAULT SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS**; **ATTACK BIKE SQUAD**; **DEVASTATOR SQUAD**; **LAND SPEEDER STORM**; **RELIC TERMINATOR SQUAD**; **SCOUT BIKE SQUAD**; **SCOUT SQUAD**; **SCOUT SNIPER SQUAD**; **TACTICAL SQUAD**; **TERMINATOR ASSAULT SQUAD**; **TERMINATOR SQUAD**.

■ If an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit has a second Faction keyword on its datasheet, that Faction keyword is the name of that unit’s Chapter. For example, Asmodai has both the **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** and **DARK ANGELS** Faction keywords, and is therefore from the Dark Angels Chapter.
■ You cannot include units from more than one Chapter in your army.

**Designer’s Note**: The rules presented in this section assume that the **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units in your army are from the Dark Angels Chapter, but they can also be used to represent any Dark Angels successor Chapter, such as one described in the background section of this book, or even one of your own invention. However, players who wish to faithfully recreate the Dark Angels Chapter on the tabletop should only include **DARK ANGELS EPIC HEROES** if their collection is intended to represent the First Founding Chapter itself; Ezekiel is the Chief Librarian of the Dark Angels, for example, and not of any of their successors.

The following **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units gain the **RAVENWING** keyword if they are drawn from the Dark Angels Chapter:

■ **MOUNTED** units
■ **VEHICLE** units that can **FLY**

The following **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units gain the **DEATHWING** keyword if they are drawn from the Dark Angels Chapter:

■ **TERMINATOR** units
■ **BLADEGUARD ANCIENT**, **BLADEGUARD VETERAN SQUAD**, **STERNGUARD VETERAN SQUAD** and **VANGUARD VETERAN SQUAD WITH JUMP PACKS** units
■ **LAND RAIDER**, **LAND RAIDER CRUSADER**, **LAND RAIDER REDEEMER**, **REPULSOR** and **REPULSOR EXECUTIONER** units
■ **DREADNOUGHT** units

At the start of your Movement phase, select one of the following:

■ **Defensive Footing**: Select one **objective** you control. Until the start of your next Movement phase, that **objective** is your **Vowed objective**.
■ **Aggressive Push**: Select one or more **objective** you do not control. Until the start of your next Movement phase, each of those **objectives** is one of your **Vowed objectives**. If a rule refers to a unit or model being within range of your **Vowed objective**, that rule takes effect if that unit or model is within range of one or more of your **Vowed objectives**. Each time a **DEATHWING INFANTRY** unit from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of one or more of your **Vowed objectives**, add 1 to the Wound roll.

Friendly RAVENWING FLY units’ ranged attacks have [Ignores Cover]. Restrictions: Your army can include Dark Angels units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.
text.de: Attacken befreundeter fliegender Ravenwing-Einheiten haben [­Deckung ignorieren]. Einschränkungen: Deine Armee kann Dark-Angels-Einheiten enthalten, aber sie kann keine Adeptus-Astartes-Einheiten anderer Orden enthalten.
text.es: Los ataques a distancia las unidades VOLAR ALA DE CUERVO amigas tienen [Ignora cobertura]. Restricciones: Tu ejército puede incluir unidades Ángeles Oscuros, pero no puede incluir unidades Adeptus Astartes de otros Capítulos.
text.fr: Les attaques de tir des unités de la Ravenwing amie avec le mot-clé vol ont [Ignore le Couvert]. Restrictions : Votre armée peut inclure des unités Dark Angels, mais elle ne peut inclure aucune unité de l’Adeptus Astartes issue d’un autre Chapitre.
text.it: Gli attacchi da tiro delle unità con Volare dell’Ala del Corvo amiche hanno [Ignora la Copertura]. Restrizioni: la tua armata può includere unità dei Dark Angels, ma non può includere unità degli Adeptus Astartes di nessun altro Capitolo.
text.ja: 味方レイヴンウィング・飛行・ユニットの射撃攻撃は［遮蔽無効］を持つ。 制限：自軍にダークエンジェル・ユニットを編入してもよいが、他の戦団に属している戦闘者・ユニットを編入することはできない。
text.ko: 아군 레이븐윙 비행 유닛의 원거리 공격에 [엄폐 무시]를 부여합니다. 제한사항: 플레이어의 군대에 다크 엔젤 유닛을 포함할 수 있으나, 다른 챕터의 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛은 포함할 수 없습니다.
text.zh: 己方鸦翼单位的远程攻击拥有[无视掩体]。 限制：您的军队中可以包含黑暗天使单位，但是不能包含任何来自其他战团的阿斯塔特修会单位。

text.en:
• In the Fight phase, when a friendly CHAPLAIN unit destroys an enemy unit, enemy units within 6" of that CHAPLAIN unit make a battle-shock roll.
  • Friendly CHAPLAIN units have the following ability:
Sower of Dread (Aura): While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, that enemy unit has -1 Ld. Restrictions: Your army can include Dark Angels units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.
text.de:
• Wenn eine befreundete Ordenspriester-Einheit in der Nahkampfphase eine feindliche Einheit zerstört, führen feindliche Einheiten innerhalb von 6" um jene Ordenspriester-Einheit einen Erschütterungswurf aus.
  • Befreundete Ordenspriester-Einheiten haben folgende Fähigkeit:
Schreckenerregender Gerichtsbote (Aura): Solange sich eine feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 6" um diese Einheit befindet, hat jene feindliche Einheit -1 MW. Einschränkungen: Deine Armee kann Dark-Angels-Einheiten enthalten, aber sie kann keine Adeptus-Astartes-Einheiten anderer Orden enthalten.
text.es:
• En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad CAPELLÁN amiga elimine una unidad enemiga, las unidades enemigas a 6" o menos de esa unidad CAPELLÁN deben hacer una tirada de acobardamiento.
  • Las unidades CAPELLÁN amigas tienen esta habilidad:
Sembrar pavor (Aura): Mientras una unidad enemiga está a 6" o menos de esta unidad, dicha unidad enemiga tiene -1 a L. Restricciones: Tu ejército puede incluir unidades Ángeles Oscuros, pero no puede incluir unidades Adeptus Astartes de otros Capítulos.
text.fr:
• À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Chapelain amie détruit une unité ennemie, les unités ennemies à 6" de cette unité de Chapelain amie fait un jet d’ébranlement.
  • Les unités de Chapelain amies ont l’aptitude suivante :
Semeurs d’Effroi (Aura) : tant qu’une unité ennemie est à 6" ou moins de cette unité, l’unité ennemie a -1 en Cd. Restrictions : Votre armée peut inclure des unités Dark Angels, mais elle ne peut inclure aucune unité de l’Adeptus Astartes issue d’un autre Chapitre.
text.it:
• Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità Cappellano amica distrugge un’unità nemica, le unità nemiche entro 6" da quell’unità Cappellano effettuano un tiro per i traumi.
  • Le unità Cappellano amiche hanno la seguente abilità:
Seminatore di Terrore (Aura): fintanto che un’unità nemica si trova entro 6" da questa unità, quell’unità nemica ha -1 D. Restrizioni: la tua armata può includere unità dei Dark Angels, ma non può includere unità degli Adeptus Astartes di nessun altro Capitolo.
text.ja:
• 白兵フェイズ中、味方チャプレイン・ユニットが敵ユニットを撃破した時、そのチャプレイン・ユニットの6mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットは戦闘ショックロールを行う。
  • 味方チャプレイン・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ：
恐れを蒔く者（オーラ）：このユニットの6mv以内に一部でも入っている敵ユニットは、【統】に-1の修正を受ける。 制限：自軍にダークエンジェル・ユニットを編入してもよいが、他の戦団に属している戦闘者・ユニットを編入することはできない。
text.ko:
• 백병전 페이즈에, 아군 채플린 유닛이 적 유닛을 파괴했다면, 그 채플린 유닛의 6" 내에 있는 적 유닛은 전투충격 굴림을 수행해야 합니다.
  • 아군 채플린 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다.
공포를 심는 자(오라): 이 유닛의 6" 내에 적 유닛이 있는 동안, 그 적 유닛에 통솔 -1을 적용합니다. 제한사항: 플레이어의 군대에 다크 엔젤 유닛을 포함할 수 있으나, 다른 챕터의 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛은 포함할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 在近战阶段中，当一个己方牧师单位摧毁一个敌方单位时，位于那个牧师单位 6" 内的敌方单位进行一次战斗震慑掷骰。
  • 己方牧师单位拥有以下技能：
恐怖播撒者（光环）：当一个敌方单位位于该单位 6" 内时。那个敌方单位拥有 -1 Ld。 限制：您的军队中可以包含黑暗天使单位，但是不能包含任何来自其他战团的阿斯塔特修会单位。

text.en:
• Friendly Adeptus Astartes units’ weapon profiles with ‘Plasma’ in their names are plasma weapon profiles.
  • Plasma weapon profiles have +1 S.
Restrictions: Your army can include Dark Angels units, but it cannot include any Adeptus Astartes units drawn from any other Chapter.
text.de:
• Waffenprofile befreundeter Adeptus-Astartes-Einheiten mit dem Begriff „Plasma“ im Namen sind Plasma-Waffenprofile.
  • Plasma-Waffenprofile haben +1 S.
Einschränkungen: Deine Armee kann Dark-Angels-Einheiten enthalten, aber sie kann keine Adeptus-Astartes-Einheiten anderer Orden enthalten.
text.es:
• Los perfiles de arma con “plasma” en su nombre de las unidades Adeptus Astartes amigas son perfiles de arma plasma.
  • Los perfiles de arma plasma tienen +1 a F.
Restricciones: Tu ejército puede incluir unidades Ángeles Oscuros, pero no puede incluir unidades Adeptus Astartes de otros Capítulos.
text.fr:
• Les profils d’armes des unités de l’Adeptus Astartes qui ont "Plasma" dans leur nom sont à plasma.
  • Les profils d’armes à Plasma ont +1 en F.
Restrictions : Votre armée peut inclure des unités Dark Angels, mais elle ne peut inclure aucune unité de l’Adeptus Astartes issue d’un autre Chapitre.
text.it:
• I profili d’arma delle unità degli Adeptus Astartes amiche con ‘Plasma’ nel nome sono profili d’arma plasma.
  • I profili d’arma plasma hanno +1 Fo.
Restrizioni: la tua armata può includere unità dei Dark Angels, ma non può includere unità degli Adeptus Astartes di nessun altro Capitolo.
text.ja:
• 味方戦闘者・ユニットの武器名に「プラズマ」を含む武器プロフィールは プラズマ武器である。
  • プラズマ武器の能力値は、【攻】に+1の修正を受ける。
制限：自軍にダークエンジェル・ユニットを編入してもよいが、他の戦団に属している戦闘者・ユニットを編入することはできない。
text.ko:
• 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛의 무기 프로필 명칭에 ‘플라스마’가 있다면 플라스마 무기 프로필입니다.
  • 플라스마 무기 프로필에 위력 +1을 적용합니다.
제한사항: 플레이어의 군대에 다크 엔젤 유닛을 포함할 수 있으나, 다른 챕터의 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛은 포함할 수 없습니다.
text.zh:
• 己方阿斯塔特修会单位的带有“等离子”一词的武器数据被称为等离子武器数据：
  • 等离子 武器数据拥有 +1 S.
限制：您的军队中可以包含黑暗天使单位，但是不能包含任何来自其他战团的阿斯塔特修会单位。

text.en:
While an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army is Battle-shocked, change the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit to 1, instead of 0.

In your Command phase, select one **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army; until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

■ Each time an enemy unit (excluding **MONSTERS** and **VEHICLES**) within Engagement Range of one or more **RAVENWING** units from your army Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, if that enemy unit is Battle‑shocked, subtract 1 from each of those tests.
■ Each time a **DEATHWING** unit from your army declares a charge, if one or more targets of that charge are within Engagement Range of one or more **RAVENWING** units from your army, add 2 to the Charge roll.

Friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** have:
▪ This unit’s ranged attacks have **[ASSAULT]**.
▪ When this unit is selected to make a **fall‐back move**, that **fall‐back move** does not prevent this unit from being **eligible to shoot**.

Friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** have:
▪ This unit’s ranged attacks have **[ASSAULT]**.
▪ When this unit is selected to make an **advance move**, that **advance move** does not prevent this unit from being **eligible to declare a charge**.
▪ When this unit is selected to make a **fall‐back move**, that **fall‐back move** does not prevent this unit from being **eligible to shoot** and **eligible to declare a charge.**

Each time an attack targets an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

target.en: One **DEATHWING INFANTRY** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than your unit’s Toughness characteristic, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: In the name of their oaths to Chapter, Primarch and Emperor, the Deathwing march into the fiercest firestorms and refuse to falter.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their transhuman physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. In addition, if one or more **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** units from your army are currently Battle-shocked, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: With focused aggression, the Dark Angels relentlessly punish the foe.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[ASSAULT]**, **[HEAVY]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

fluff.en: There is no escaping the wrath of the Unforgiven when they bring their disciplined firepower to bear.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their transhuman physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: If that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more **RAVENWING** units from your army, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that enemy unit is within Engagement Range of one or more **DEATHWING** units from your army, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of the target, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

restrictions.en: A unit cannot be targeted by this and the Armour of Contempt Stratagem in the same phase.

fluff.en: Combining their specialised methods of warfare, the Ravenwing and Deathwing confound their enemies with high‑speed manoeuvrability and stalwart fortitude.

target.en: That **RAVENWING** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase, just after a **RAVENWING** unit from your army has selected its targets.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 12" of your unit that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **DEATHWING** unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Ravenwing vehicles tear across the battlefield, identifying priority threats and targeting them with volleys of killing fire. The storm of blazing fury serves as a beacon for the wrathful battle‑brothers of the Inner Circle, who strive to bring final judgement to the foe.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their transhuman physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, when a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit ends an **advance move**.

effect.en: That **advance move** does not prevent your unit from being **eligible to declare a charge**.

fluff.en: The Ravenwing employ shock tactics and focussed firepower to tear bloody paths through the enemy ranks, shattering resistance and clearing the way to their true quarry.

target.en: One **RAVENWING** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Even when travelling at breakneck pace, the Ravenwing control their vehicles with consummate skill and are able to jink and dodge around incoming enemy fire.

target.en: One **RAVENWING** unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The Ravenwing scan and analyse their foes’ strategic dispositions constantly, augury and aerial surveillance helping to watch that no quarry slips their closing net. They are quick to redirect combat assets should such a risk present itself.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: The belligerence of the Adeptus Astartes combined with their transhuman physiology makes them unyielding foes to face.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the **RAVENWING** keyword, it is also eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: When the constituent elements of the Dark Angels fight as one, the enemy is often overwhelmed and torn apart by the fluidity of the Chapter’s rapid advances, tactical withdrawals and unexpected counteroffensives.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Charge phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Countless assaults have faltered against the unbreakable ceramite wall that is the Unforgiven standing their ground.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES CHARACTER** unit that is on the battlefield.

when.en: Any phase, just after your Oath of Moment target is destroyed.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within 12" and visible to your unit. That enemy unit becomes your Oath of Moment target until the start of your next Command phase.

fluff.en: The Dark Angels pursue their enemies relentlessly, eliminating one with ruthless precision before turning to the next.

target.en: One **DEATHWING INFANTRY** unit from your army that just ended a Charge move.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit and roll one D6 for each model in your unit, adding 1 to the result if that enemy unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound (to a maximum of 3 mortal wounds).

fluff.en: Channelling the strategic puissance and measured ferocity of their gene-sire, the veterans of the Unforgiven unleash a perfectly timed and utterly lethal storm of tightly controlled violence.

target.en: One **DEATHWING INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If your unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

fluff.en: The warriors of the Deathwing fight with the honed skill and lethality of knightly champions.

target.en: One **DEATHWING** unit from your army that is arriving using the Deep Strike ability this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy models.

restrictions.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

fluff.en: The Deathwing employ ancient and incredibly powerful teleportariums, some older than the Great Crusade, to strike at their foes with unparalleled safety and accuracy.

target.en: One **DEATHWING** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 if your unit is within range of your Vowed objective marker. On a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: So driven by duty are the veterans of the Unforgiven that even death cannot keep them from it.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Your Movement phase, just after an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army Falls Back.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

fluff.en: Even the Dark Angels must give ground occasionally, but their stubborn determination ensures they never do so for long, or without a fight.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that had one or more models destroyed as a result of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.

effect.en: Your unit can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but it must target only the enemy unit that just attacked it, and can only do so if that enemy unit is an eligible target.

fluff.en: Stern and vengeful as they are, the warriors of the Unforgiven Chapters deliver swift retribution to any foe foolish enough to try to lay them low.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase or the start of the Fight phase.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle‑shock test. When doing so, if your unit has the **DEATHWING** or **RAVENWING** keyword, subtract 1 from the result.

restrictions.en: You can only use this Stratagem once per battle round.

fluff.en: Engines roar, and teleportation flares erupt across the battlefield. Such is the din and ferocity of the Dark Angels’ assault that even the most veteran foes are given cause to cower before it.

target.en: One **RAVENWING** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase or your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features.

fluff.en: Atop their snarling mechanical steeds, the warriors of the Ravenwing surge through seemingly impassable terrain, smashing through rubble and ruin to unleash the wrath of the Unforgiven upon unsuspecting targets.

target.en: One **RAVENWING MOUNTED** unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Using augur beacons, servo-skulls and the like, the Ravenwing mark locations they have passed through and cleansed of foes, laying a trial their fellows can follow on the hunt.

target.en: That **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is **selected to fight**.

effect.en: Your unit's melee attacks have **[LANCE]**.

fluff.en: Be it their true quarry or simply one who possesses knowledge that will lead them to their apprehension, when the Ravenwing strike at a priority target they do so with unmerciful surety.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in your unit. In addition, until the end of the turn, if your unit does not have the **DEATHWING**, **RAVENWING** or **VEHICLE** keyword, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Unflinching in their loyalty to Chapter and Primarch, Dark Angels battle-brothers seize and hold their objectives with unrelenting determination and zealous fury.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** or **ADEPTUS ASTARTES MOUNTED** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, add 2 to the Strength characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit.

fluff.en: Amongst the many secrets hoarded by the Dark Angels are those technological in nature. The armouries of the Rock contain potent weapons unseen in the armouries of other Chapters.

target.en: One **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit from your army within 3" of one or more enemy units, or one Deathwing unit from your army within 6" of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.

restrictions.en: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

fluff.en: The Dark Angels are always aggressive in their waging of war, seizing any opportunity to pounce upon and annihilate their prey.

target.en: One **DEATHWING INFANTRY** or **DEATHWING WALKER** unit from your army that is within 6" of one or more enemy units and would be eligible to declare a charge against one or more of those enemy units if it were your Charge phase.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Charge phase.

effect.en: Your unit now declares a charge that only targets one or more of those enemy units, and you resolve that charge.

restrictions.en: Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.

fluff.en: The Dark Angels’ Inner Circle warriors pursue the Chapter’s sworn foes and any who shield them with relentless endurance and a determination borne of indoctrinated hatred.

target.en: That <k>Ravenwing Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de la <k>Ravenwing</k> avec le mot-clé <k>vol</k>
target.ja: その<k>レイヴンウィング・飛行</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Ravenwing Fly</k> unit.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>fliegende Ravenwing</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga toma como blanco una unidad <k>Volar Ala de Cuervo</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de la <k>Ravenwing</k> amie avec le mot-clé <k>vol</k>.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità dell’<k>Ala del Corvo</k> con <k>Volare</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>レイヴンウィング・飛行</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>레이븐윙 비행</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정할 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中，当一个敌方单位将一个己方<k>鸦翼飞行</k>单位选为目标时。

effect.en: Your unit has Stealth.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは隠密能力を持つ。

fluff.en: Through subtle manoeuvring and empowered cameleoline armour, the swiftest of the Ravenwing evade attempts to bring their hunt to an end.
fluff.de: Durch subtile Manöver und chameolinbeschichtete Panzerung vermögen die schnellsten Flieger des Ravenwing mühelos Versuchen, ihre Jagd vorzeitig zu beenden, auszuweichen.
fluff.es: Mediante sutiles maniobras y una capa de camaleolina potenciada, los más veloces vehículos del Alas de Cuervo evaden los intentos de poner fin a su caza.
fluff.fr: Grâce à des manœuvres subtiles et un blindage revêtu de caméléolin, les éléments les plus rapides de la Ravenwing évitent les tentatives visant à mettre un terme à leur traque.
fluff.it: Grazie a scaltre manovre e corazze di cameleolina rinforzate, gli elementi più rapidi dell’Ala del Corvo riescono a sventare qualsiasi tentativo di mettere fine alla loro caccia.
fluff.ja: 緻密な操縦と、増幅されたカメレオラインの装甲を駆使しつつ、精鋭のレイヴンウィングは狩りの妨げとなる攻撃を巧みに回避してゆく。
fluff.ko: 레이븐윙의 가장 빠른 기체들은 교묘한 기동과 강화 카멜레올린 장갑으로 그 사냥에 종지부를 찍으려는 이들로부터 빠져나간다.
fluff.zh: 凭借精妙的机动与强化的迷彩战甲，鸦翼中最迅捷的战士们避开了企图终结其狩猎的一切尝试。

target.en: That <k>Ravenwing Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de la <k>Ravenwing</k> avec le mot-clé <k>vol</k>
target.ja: その<k>レイヴンウィング・飛行</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Ravenwing Fly</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>fliegende Ravenwing</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Volar Ala de Cuervo</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de la <k>Ravenwing</k> amie avec le mot-clé <k>vol</k> a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, dopo che un’unità dell’<k>Ala del Corvo</k> con <k>Volare</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>レイヴンウィング・飛行</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>레이븐윙 비행</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 您的射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>鸦翼飞行</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Visible enemy units within 6" of your unit have +3" detection range.
effect.de: Für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheiten innerhalb von 6" haben +3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Las unidades enemigas visibles para tu unidad y a 6" o menos de ella tienen +3" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Les unités ennemies Visible et à 6" ou moins de votre unité ont +3" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Le unità nemiche visibili entro 6" dalla tua unità hanno +3" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの6mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能である敵ユニットは、発見範囲に+3mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 6" 내에 있으며 시야에 들어온 유닛에 발각 범위 +3"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在一个可见敌方单位位于您的单位的 6" 内时，那个敌方单位的侦测范围 +3"。

fluff.en: The auspicators of the Ravenwing are sleepless, and from ideal hunting vantages, there is nowhere the foe can hide for long.
fluff.de: Die Auspicatoren des Ravenwing sind rastlos. Wenn sie von idealen Aussichtspunkten aus eingesetzt werden, gibt es keine Verstecke.
fluff.es: Los auspiciadores del Ala de Cuervo no duermen, y desde posiciones estratégicas de caza detectan a los enemigos escondidos.
fluff.fr: Les auspicateurs de la Ravenwing ne dorment jamais, ce qui fait que l'ennemi ne peut rester longtemps caché.
fluff.it: Gli auspicator dell’Ala del Corvo sono sempre vigili e, situati in punti ideali per la caccia, non consentono al nemico di nascondersi in nessun luogo.
fluff.ja: レイヴンウィングの探知士は、休みなく監視を続ける。最適な狩場たる高所から索敵し、敵が長時間潜伏できる余地を与えない。
fluff.ko: 레이븐윙의 오스피케이터는 쉬는 법을 모르며, 사냥에 적절한 고지에서라면 적이 오래 숨어있을 수 있는 곳이란 없다.
fluff.zh: 鸦翼的扫描仪器永不休眠，在理想的狩猎高度上，没有任何敌人能够躲过它们的侦测。

target.en: That <k>Ravenwing Fly</k> unit.
target.fr: Cette unité de la <k>Ravenwing</k> avec le mot-clé <k>vol</k>.
target.ja: その<k>レイヴンウィング・飛行</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit that targeted a friendly unengaged Ravenwing Fly unit has shot.
when.de: Fernkampfphase deines Gegners, nachdem eine feindliche Einheit auf eine befreundete fliegende Ravenwing-Einheit geschossen hat, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de disparo del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que tomó como blanco una unidad Volar Ala de Cuervo amiga no trabada haya disparado.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui a ciblé une unité de la Ravenwing amie avec le mot-clé vol et non engagée a tiré.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario, dopo che un’unità nemica che ha scelto come bersaglio un’unità dell’Ala del Corvo con Volare amica non ingaggiata ha sparato.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、非接敵状態の味方レイヴンウィング・飛行・ユニットを攻撃対象にした射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈, 교전 상태가 아닌 아군 레이븐윙 비행 유닛을 대상으로 지정한 적 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 对手的射击阶段中，在以一个不处于交战状态的己方鸦翼单位为目标的敌方单位完成射击后。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: The Ravenwing’s aerial assets are capable of swift and reactive manoeuvring to new firing positions, ensuring opportunities for rapid vengeance.
fluff.de: Die Flieger des Ravenwing sind in der Lage, schnelle und reaktive Manöver zu vollführen, die sie in neue Feuerpositionen für unmittelbare Vergeltungsschläge bringen.
fluff.es: Los recursos aéreos del Ala de Cuervo son capaces de maniobrar con rapidez y presteza hacia nuevas posiciones de fuego, garantizando oportunidades para una venganza rápida.
fluff.fr: Les éléments aériens de la Ravenwing peuvent manœuvrer rapidement jusqu'à de nouvelles positions de tir, ce qui assure des opportunités de prompte vengeance.
fluff.it: Le risorse aeree dell’Ala del Corvo sono capaci di rapide manovre di reazione per portarsi in nuove posizioni di tiro e cogliere l’occasione per vendette fulminee.
fluff.ja: レイヴンウィングの航空兵器は、迅速かつ即応的に新たな射撃位置へ機動する能力を備えており、迅速で確実な反撃を可能とする。
fluff.ko: 레이븐윙의 항공 자산은 상황에 재빠르게 대응하여 새로운 사격 위치를 잡는다. 신속한 복수의 기회를 놓칠 리가 없는 것이다.
fluff.zh: 鸦翼的飞空单位能够进行快速的反应移动，前往新的射击位置并确保敌人能够受到制裁。

target.en: That <k>Chaplain</k> unit.
target.ja: そのチャプレイン・ユニット。

when.en: Your Charge phase, when a friendly Chaplain unit ends a charge move.
when.de: Deine Angriffsphase, wenn eine befreundete Ordenspriester-Einheit eine Angriffsbewegung beendet
when.es: En tu fase de carga, cuando una unidad Capellán amiga termina un movimiento de carga.
when.fr: À votre phase de Charge, quand une unité de Chapelain amie finit un mouvement de charge.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Carica, quando un’unità di Cappellano amica termina un movimento di carica.
when.ja: 自軍の突撃フェイズ中、味方チャプレイン・ユニットが突撃移動を終了した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 돌격 페이즈, 아군 채플린 유닛이 돌격 이동을 종료할 때.
when.zh: 在您的冲锋阶段中，当一个己方牧师单位结束一次冲锋移动时。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit (excluding Monster/Vehicle units) engaged with your unit. That enemy unit makes a leadership roll:
  • If that leadership roll fails, that enemy unit’s attacks have -1 to hit rolls until the end of the turn.
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit (ausgenommen Monster-/Fahrzeug-Einheiten) im Nahkampf mit deiner Einheit. Jene feindliche Einheit führt einen Moralwertwurf aus:
  • Wenn jener Moralwertwurf misslingt, haben die Attacken jener feindlichen Einheit bis zum Ende des Zugs -1 auf Trefferwürfe.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga (salvo Monstruo/Vehículo) trabada con tu unidad. Esa unidad enemiga hace una tirada de liderazgo:
  • Si falla la tirada de liderazgo, los ataques de esa unidad enemiga tienen -1 a las tiradas para impactar hasta el final del turno.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie (unités de Monstre/Véhicule exclues) engagée avec votre unité. L’unité ennemie choisie fait un jet d’ébranlement:
  • Si ce jet d'ébranlement échoue, les attaques de l'unité ennemie ont -1 aux jets de touche jusqu'à la fin du tour.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica (escluse le unità Mostro/Veicolo) ingaggiata con la tua unità. Quell’unità nemica effettua un tiro disciplina.
  • Se quel tiro disciplina fallisce, gli attacchi di quell’unità nemica hanno -1 ai tiri per colpire fino alla fine del turno.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットと接敵状態である敵ユニット（モンスター/ビークル・ユニットを除く）を1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットは指揮統制ロールを行う：
  • その指揮統制ロールが失敗した場合、そのターン終了時まで、その敵ユニットの攻撃のヒットロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛과 교전 상태인 적 유닛(괴수/기체 유닛 제외) 하나를 지정합니다. 그 유닛이 통솔력 체크를 수행합니다.
  • 그 통솔력 체크 실패 시, 턴이 종료될 때까지 그 적 유닛의 공격에 명중 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个与您的单位处于交战状态的敌方单位（凶兽/载具单位除外）。那个敌方单位进行一次领导力掷骰：
  • 如果那次领导力掷骰失败，那么在回合结束前那个敌方单位的攻击拥有 -1 命中掷骰。

fluff.en: The intensity with which the skull‑masked Interrogator‑Chaplains plunge into the fray can shake the hardiest warriors. All who face them feel the tiniest of guilts eating away at their soul.
fluff.de: Die Intensität, mit der die schädelgesichtigen Absolutionspriester sich in den Kampf werfen, kann selbst abgebrühte Kämpfer erschüttern. Wer sich ihnen im Kampf gegenübersieht, spürt jedes noch so kleine Schuldgefühl als Stich in der Seele.
fluff.es: La intensidad con la que los Capellanes Interrogadores se lanzan a la refriega asusta incluso a los guerreros más aguerridos. Quienes se enfrentan a ellos sienten la culpa carcomiendo su alma.
fluff.fr: La férocité avec laquelle les Chapelains-investigateurs au masque en forme de crâne se ruent en mêlée peut ébranler les guerriers les plus résistants. Tous ceux qui les affrontent sentent la culpabilité ronger leur âme.
fluff.it: Il fervore con cui i Cappellani-Interrogatori dalla maschera di teschio si lanciano nella mischia spaventa persino i guerrieri più coraggiosi. Chiunque li affronti si sente divorato dal senso di colpa.
fluff.ja: 骸骨の仮面をまとう尋問教戒官が戦場へ躍り込むその姿は、いかに頑強な勇士をも動揺させる。この者たちに対峙する者は誰しも、魂を侵すわずかな罪の影を感じ取る。
fluff.ko: 제아무리 노련한 전사라도 해골 가면을 쓴 심문채플린이 강렬히 전투에 뛰어드는 모습을 보면 동요하기 마련이다. 이들과 맞서는 적은 일말의 죄책감이라도 남아 있다면 그 영혼을 좀먹히게 된다.
fluff.zh: 那些佩戴着骷髅面具的审讯牧师以狂烈之势投身战阵，足以令最坚毅的战士亦为之动摇。凡直面他们者，无不感到一丝微弱的罪疚正啃噬着自己的灵魂。

target.en: That <k>Chaplain</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>チャプレイン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when a friendly Chaplain unit is selected to attack.
when.de: In deiner Fernkampfphase oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Ordenspriester-Einheit zum Attackieren gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Capellán amiga se elige para atacar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité de Chapelain amie est choisie pour attaquer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Cappellano amica viene scelta per attaccare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、あるいは任意の白兵フェイズ中、味方チャプレイン・ユニットが攻撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 아군 채플린 유닛이 공격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段或在近战阶段中，当一个己方牧师单位被选择进行攻击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks have <k>[Precision]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen <k>[Precisión]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de votre unité ont <k>[Précision]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità hanno <k>[Precisione]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの攻撃は<k>［精密攻撃］</k>を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位的攻击拥有<k>[精准]</k>。

fluff.en: With a denunciatory roar, Chaplains lead their battle‑brothers in focused assaults to root out the foe’s reviled leaders.
fluff.de: Mit einem anklagenden Aufschrei führen Ordenspriester ihre Brüder in zielgerichteten Angriffen gegen die verhassten Anführer ihrer Feinde.
fluff.es: Con un rugido de denuncia, los Capellanes lideran a sus hermanos de batalla en asaltos concentrados para erradicar a los despreciables líderes enemigos.
fluff.fr: D’un rugissement dénonciateur, les Chapelains mènent leurs frères de bataille dans des assauts visant à éradiquer les infâmes chefs ennemis.
fluff.it: Con un ruggito di condanna, i Cappellani guidano i confratelli in assalti concentrati per eliminare i vili leader nemici.
fluff.ja: 教戒官は断罪の咆哮とともに戦闘同胞を率い、忌まわしき敵の指導者を討ち取るべく、攻勢を集中させる。
fluff.ko: 적의 악명 높은 지휘관을 처단하고자, 채플린이 비난의 포효를 동반한 집중 공격으로 전투형제들을 이끈다.
fluff.zh: 在大声训斥之下，牧师们率领战斗修士展开集中突袭并找到敌人的可憎领袖。

target.en: That <k>Chaplain</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>チャプレイン</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit that was engaged with a friendly Chaplain unit ends a fall‑back move, if that Chaplain unit is unengaged.
when.de: Bewegungsphase deines Gegners, wenn eine feindliche Einheit, die sich im Nahkampf mit einer befreundeten Ordenspriester-Einheit befand, eine Rückzugsbewegung beendet und jene Ordenspriester-Einheit nicht im Nahkampf ist
when.es: En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga que estaba trabada con alguna unidad Capellán amiga termina un movimiento de retroceder y esa unidad Capellán se considera no trabada.
when.fr: À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie qui était engagée avec une unité de Chapelain amie finit un mouvement de retraite, si cette unité de Chapelain est non engagée.
when.it: Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica che era ingaggiata con un’unità di Cappellano amica termina un movimento di ripiegamento, se quell’unità di Cappellano è non ingaggiata.
when.ja: 敵軍側移動フェイズ中、味方チャプレイン・ユニットと接敵状態であった敵ユニットが退却移動を終了させた時、そのチャプレイン・ユニットが非接敵状態である場合。
when.ko: 상대의 이동 페이즈, 아군 채플린 유닛과 교전 상태였던 적 유닛이 후퇴 이동을 종료할 때, 그 채플린 유닛이 교전 상태가 아닌 경우.
when.zh: 您对手的移动阶段中，在原本与一个己方牧师单位处于交战状态的一个敌方单位结束一次后撤移动后，并且那个牧师单位不处于交战状态。

effect.en: Your unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
effect.de: Deine Einheit kann eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
effect.es: Tu unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
effect.fr: Votre unité peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
effect.it: La tua unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
effect.ja: その自軍側ユニットは、最大D3+3mvまでの通常移動を行える。
effect.ko: 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位可以进行一次最多 D3+3" 的常规移动。

fluff.en: The spiritual leaders of the Dark Angels are ever watchful for lapses of conviction, and when displayed by the foe, they are the first to fervently capitalise on them.
fluff.de: Die religiösen Anführer der Dark Angels sind stets wachsam auf der Suche nach versagender Entschlossenheit. Sollte der Feind sich diesen Fehler erlauben, schlagen sie umgehend Kapital daraus.
fluff.es: Los líderes espirituales de los Ángeles Oscuros siempre están atentos a las faltas de convicción, y cuando el enemigo las muestra, son los primeros en aprovecharlas con fervor.
fluff.fr: Les chefs spirituels des Dark Angels sont toujours vigilants au manque de conviction, et lorsque l'ennemi en fait preuve, ils sont les premiers à en tirer parti.
fluff.it: I leader spirituali dei Dark Angels sono sempre alla ricerca di segni di cedimento e, quando li trovano nei nemici, sono i primi a sfruttarli senza scrupoli.
fluff.ja: ダークエンジェルの精神的指導者たちは、意思の揺らぎを決して見逃さない。敵に動揺の兆しが見えた瞬間、この者たちはそれを突き、誰よりも早く攻勢に転じる。
fluff.ko: 다크 엔젤의 영적 인도자들은 신념의 약화를 주시하고 있으며, 적이 그러한 증상을 보일 때 가장 먼저 이를 열정적으로 활용한다.
fluff.zh: 黑暗天使的精神领袖时刻警惕着信念的动摇；一旦敌方流露出此类破绽，他们便会率先出击，狂热地加以利用。

target.en: That <k>Hellblaster Squad</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ヘルブラスター・スカッド</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>地狱轰击者小队</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Hellblaster Squad</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Plasma-­Interfectortrupp</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Escuadra de Revientainfiernos</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’<k>Escouade Hellblaster</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di tiro, dopo che un’unità di <k>Squadra Hellblaster</k> amica ha sparato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>ヘルブラスター・スカッド</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>헬블라스터 분대</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>地狱轰击者小队</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit hit by your unit’s plasma ranged attacks. That enemy unit is seared until the start of your next turn:
  • While a unit is seared, that unit has ‑2" M.
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit, die von mindestens einer Plasma-­Fernkampfattacke deiner Einheit getroffen wurde. Jene Einheit ist bis zum Beginn deines nächsten Zugs versengt:
  • Solange eine Einheit versengt ist, hat jene Einheit -2" B.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de los ataques plasma a distancia de tu unidad. Dicha unidad está abrasada hasta el inicio de tu siguiente turno:
  • Mientras una unidad esté abrasada, tiene -2" a M.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par les attaques de tir à plasma de votre unité. L’unité ennemie est brûlée jusqu’au début de votre prochain tour :
  • Tant qu’une unité est brûlée, elle a ‑2" en M.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica colpita dagli attacchi da tiro plasma della tua unità. Quell’unità nemica è bruciata fino all’inizio del tuo prossimo turno:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è bruciata, ha -2" M.
effect.ja:
その自軍ユニットのプラズマ射撃攻撃がヒットした敵ユニットを1個選択する。次の自軍側ターン開始時まで、選択された敵ユニットは焼灼状態となる。
  • ユニットが焼灼状態である間、そのユニットの【移】は-2mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
이 유닛의 플라스마 원거리 공격이 명중한 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 플레이어의 다음 턴이 시작될 때까지 그 적 유닛은 불살라집니다.
  • 유닛이 불살라진 동안, 그 유닛에 이동 -2"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个被您单位的等离子远程攻击命中的敌方单位。在您的下一个回合开始前，那个敌方单位被灼烧：
  • 在一个单位被灼烧时，那个单位拥有 ‑2"M。

fluff.en: When correctly calibrated and respectfully invoked, a plasma incinerator can fire blinding bolts that burst with searing energy. Those not killed are scorched and blistered by near misses.
fluff.de: Wenn sie korrekt eingestellt und respektvoll aktiviert werden, können Plasmabrenner blendende Geschosse aus flammender Energie verschießen. Wer nicht getötet wird, wird durch die im Umfeld einschlagenden Projektile versengt, bis die Haut Blasen schlägt.
fluff.es: Cuando se calibra correctamente y se invoca con respeto, un incinerador de plasma puede disparar rayos cegadores que estallan con energía abrasadora. Los que no mueren sufren terribles quemaduras y ampollas.
fluff.fr: Lorsqu’il est correctement calibré et sollicité avec respect, un incinérateur à plasma peut tirer des décharges aveuglantes qui brûleront atrocement ceux qui leur survivront.
fluff.it: Se calibrato correttamente e invocato con rispetto, un inceneritore plasma spara incandescenti dardi di energia. Chi non muore sul colpo viene ustionato dai colpi di striscio.
fluff.ja: 適切に調整され、儀礼に則して起動されたプラズマインシネレイターは、目も眩むほどの光弾を撃ち出し、灼熱のエネルギーを放出する。たとえ生き延びたとしても、かすめた熱波によって身は焦がされ、水疱に覆われることだろう。
fluff.ko: 정확히 보정되고 공손한 간청을 받은 플라스마 소각기는 불사르는 에너지를 발사하여 눈부신 폭발을 일으킨다. 이는 스치기만 해도 그을려 화상에 뒤덮이게 되며, 직격은 즉사를 의미한다.
fluff.zh: 在进行正确的调校和细致的唤醒后，等离子焚化枪能够进行灼热的能量连射，就算没有命中敌人也能将其烧伤。

name.es: No hay sacrificio lo suficientemente grande
name.ja: いかなる犠牲も厭わず

target.en: That <k>Adeptus Astartes</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>戦闘者</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>阿斯塔特修会</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Adeptus-­Astartes-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Adeptus Astartes amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de l’Adeptus Astartes amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità degli Adeptus Astartes amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方戦闘者・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方阿斯塔特修会单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s [HAZARDOUS] plasma ranged attacks have +1 S.
effect.es: Los ataques plasma a distancia [DE RIESGO] de tu unidad tienen +1 a F.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir [À Risque] à plasma de votre unité ont +1 en F.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro plasma con l'abilità [Pericolosa] della tua unità hanno +1 Fo.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの［暴発］を持つプラズマ武器の射撃攻撃は【攻】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.zh: 您的单位的[危险] 等离子远程攻击拥有 +1 S。

fluff.en: In extremis, the invoking of plasma coils’ output may be pushed past even the tolerances proscribed by Mars. The price is one the Chapter is prepared to make.
fluff.de: In Extremfällen kann der Ausstoß von Plasmaspulen über die vom Mars vorgeschriebenen Grenzen hinausgetrieben werden. Der Preis ist einer, den der Orden zu entrichten bereit ist.
fluff.es: En casos extremos, la energía que sale de las bobinas de plasma podría sobrepasar incluso las tolerancias prescritas por Marte. El Capítulo está dispuesto a pagar el precio.
fluff.fr: En cas extrême, il est possible de pousser les armes à plasma au-delà des tolérances édictées par Mars. Le Chapitre est toujours prêt à en payer le prix.
fluff.it: In casi estremi le prestazioni delle bobine plasma possono essere spinte oltre la tolleranza stabilita da Marte. Il Capitolo è disposto a pagarne il costo.
fluff.ja: 窮地に局面した際、プラズマコイルの出力は火星（ルビ、火星：マーズ）の規定許容値を超えられることがある。ただし戦団は、その代償を承知の上で支払わねばならない。
fluff.ko: 극한의 상황이 닥치면 화성에서 금지한 수준을 초과하여 플라스마 코일의 출력을 증가하도록 간청할 수 있고, 챕터는 기꺼이 그 대가를 치를 준비가 되어 있다.
fluff.zh: 在极端情况下，等离子线圈的输出可以被提升至超过火星规定的接受范围。但战团的战士们也愿意付出这个代价。

target.en: That <k>Adeptus Astartes</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>戦闘者</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>阿斯塔特修会</k>单位。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Adeptus Astartes unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Adeptus-­Astartes-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Adeptus Astartes amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de l’Adeptus Astartes amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità degli Adeptus Astartes amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方戦闘者・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈에, 아군 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方阿斯塔特修会单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s plasma ranged attacks have +1 to hit rolls.
effect.es: Los ataques plasma a distancia de tu unidad tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir à plasma de votre unité ont +1 aux jets de touche.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro plasma della tua unità hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットのプラズマ射撃攻撃のヒットロールは+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 플라스마 원거리 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的等离子远程攻击的命中掷骰 +1。

fluff.en: The weapon spirits of the Dark Angels are known to despise guilt, and gunners who chant the foe’s unrepentant acts may be rewarded with merciless precision.
fluff.de: Die Waffengeister des Arsenals der Dark Angels verachten angeblich alle Schuldigen; Schützen, die das reuelose Verhalten des Feindes auflisten, können mit erbarmungsloser Präzision belohnt werden.
fluff.es: Los espíritus de las armas de los Ángeles Oscuros desprecian a los culpables, y los artilleros que castigan los malos actos del enemigo se ven recompensados ​​con una precisión despiadada.
fluff.fr: Les esprits des armes des Dark Angels sont réputés pour exécrer la culpabilité, et les artilleurs qui scandent les actes impénitents de l'ennemi sont parfois gratifiés d'une précision impitoyable.
fluff.it: È noto che spiriti delle armi dei Dark Angels odiano i peccati, e gli artiglieri che declamano gli atti indegni dei nemici sono ricompensati con una precisione micidiale.
fluff.ja: ダークエンジェルの武器に宿る精霊は、罪を忌み嫌うとされる。敵の悔悟なき悪行を詠唱する射手は、容赦なき精度という報いを得る。
fluff.ko: 다크 엔젤의 무기령은 죄를 혐오하며, 뉘우칠 줄 모르는 적의 행위를 읊는 사수에게 무자비한 정확도를 부여하기도 한다.
fluff.zh: 众所周知，黑暗天使的机魂厌恶罪孽；若炮手高声历数敌军的冥顽不灵之举，其武器便可能以冷酷无情的精准度作为回报。

description.en: Chaplain model only. This unit has +1 to charge rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Ordenspriester-Modell. Diese Einheit hat +1 auf Angriffswürfe.
description.es: Solo miniatura Capellán. Esta unidad tiene +1 a las Tiradas de carga.
description.fr: Figurine de Chapelain seulement. Cette unité a +1 aux jets de charge.
description.it: Solo modelli di Cappellano. Questa unità ha +1 ai tiri per caricare.
description.ja: チャプレイン・兵のみ。このユニットの突撃ロールは+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 채플린 모델 전용. 이 유닛에 돌격 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限牧师模型。该单位进行的冲锋掷骰 +1。

name.ja: 飛翔する斥候（アップグレード）

description.en: Ravenwing Fly unit only. In your first Movement phase, this unit can make an ingress move.
description.de: Nur für eine fliegende Ravenwing-Einheit. In deiner ersten Bewegungsphase kann diese Einheit eine Einsatzbewegung ausführen.
description.es: Solo unidad Volar Ala de Cuervo. En tu primera fase de movimiento, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento de inserción.
description.fr: Unité de la Ravenwing avec le mot-clé vol seulement. À votre première phase de Mouvement, cette unité peut faire un mouvement d’arrivée.
description.it: Solo unità dell’Ala del Corvo con Volare. Nella tua prima fase di Movimento questa unità può effettuare un movimento di inserzione.
description.ja: レイヴンウィング・航空機・ユニットのみ。自軍の最初の移動フェイズ中、このユニットは 突入移動を行える。
description.ko: 레이븐윙 비행 유닛 전용. 플레이어의 첫 번째 이동 페이즈에, 이 유닛은 진입 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限鸦翼飞行单位。在您的第一个移动阶段中，该单位可以进行一次入场移动。

name.ja: 夜鍛えの武器（アップグレード）

description.en:
Land Speeder Vengeance unit only. This unit can re‑roll:
  • Rolls to determine the A of a weapon.
  • Hazard rolls.
description.de:
Nur für eine Land-Speeder-Vengeance-Einheit. Für diese Einheit können folgende Würfe wiederholt werden:
  • Würfe zum Bestimmen der A einer Waffe.
  • Risikowürfe.
description.es:
Solo unidad Land Speeder Venganza. Esta unidad puede repetir sus:
  • Tiradas para determinar los A de un arma.
  • Tiradas de riesgo.
description.fr:
Unité de Land Speeder Vengeance seulement. Cette unité peut relancer :
  • Les jets pour déterminer les A d’une arme.
  • Les jets de Risque.
description.it:
Solo unità di Land Speeder Vengeance. Questa unità può ripetere:
  • I tiri per determinare la caratteristica A di un’arma.
  • I tiri pericolo.
description.ja:
ランドスピーダー・ヴェンジェンス・ユニットのみ。このユニットは以下をリロールできる：
  • 武器の【数】を決定する際のダイスロール。
  • ハザードロール。
description.ko:
랜드 스피더 벤전스 유닛 전용. 이 유닛은 다음을 재굴림할 수 있습니다.
  • 무기의 공격 수치를 정하는 굴림
  • 위험 굴림
description.zh:
仅限复仇型兰德速攻艇单位。该单位可以重掷：
  • 判断武器 A 时进行的掷骰。
  • 危险掷骰。

name.ja: コイルの安定化（アップグレード）

description.en: Adeptus Astartes unit only. This unit’s plasma attacks have +6" R.
description.de: Nur für eine Adeptus-Astartes-Einheit. Die Plasma-Attacken dieser Einheit haben +6" Reichw.
description.es: Solo unidad Adeptus Astartes. Los ataques plasma de esta unidad tienen +6" Alc.
description.fr: Unité de l’Adeptus Astartes seulement. Les attaques à plasma de cette unité ont +6" en P.
description.it: Solo unità degli Adeptus Astartes. Gli attacchi plasma di questa unità hanno +6" G.
description.ja: 戦闘者・ユニットのみ。このユニットのプラズマ攻撃の 【射】は+6mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 아뎁투스 아스타르테스 유닛 전용. 이 유닛의 플라스마 공격에 사거리 +6"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限阿斯塔特修会单位。该单位等离子攻击的 R +6"。

name.ja: 灼熱のコイル（アップグレード）

description.en: Hellblaster Squad only. This unit’s snap shooting attacks hit on unmodified hit rolls of 5+.
description.de: Nur für eine Plasma-Interfectortrupp-Einheit. Eiliger-Beschuss-Attacken dieser Einheit treffen bei unmodifizierten Trefferwürfen von 5+.
description.es: Solo unidad Escuadra de Revientainfiernos. Los ataques de disparos repentinos de esta unidad impactan con toda tirada para impactar de 5+ sin modificar.
description.fr: Unité d’Escouade Hellblaster seulement. Les attaques de tir au jugé de l’unité touchent sur des jets de touche non modifiés de 5+.
description.it: Solo Squadra Hellblaster. Gli attacchi tiro improvviso di questa unità colpiscono con tiri per colpire non modificati di 5+.

description.en:
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. (Once per battle, per army) When this model is **destroyed**, at the end of the phase, roll one D6:
▪ On a 2+, set up this model on the battlefield, **unengaged** and as close as possible to where it was **destroyed**. This model is not part of an **attached** unit and its unit has a **starting strength** of 1. This model has 3 wounds remaining, or its full wounds remaining if this model was **battle-shocked** when it was **destroyed**.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that unit is Battle-shocked and below its Starting Strength.

**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. While the bearer is Battle-shocked, add 2 to the Attacks, Strength and Damage characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons instead.

**ANCIENT** model only. While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. While that unit is Battle-shocked, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

**DEATHWING** model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability, and each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if it is within range of your Vowed objective marker, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.
**DEATHWING** model only. Each time you target the bearer’s unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6, adding 1 if the bearer is within range of your Vowed objective marker: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.
**DEATHWING** model only. Each time the bearer’s unit Piles In or Consolidates, models in that unit can move an additional 3".

**DEATHWING** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.
**RAVENWING** model only. Melee weapons equipped by the bearer have the **[PRECISION]** ability.
**RAVENWING** model only. You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

**Ravenwing** model only. If the bearer’s unit starts the battle in Strategic Reserves, its points value does not count towards the combined points limit for units from your army that are in Strategic Reserve, and for the purposes of setting up that unit on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.
**RAVENWING** model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 9" ability.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons.
**RAVENWING** model only. The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back and you can re‑roll Desperate Escape tests taken for models in the bearer’s unit.
**CAPTAIN**, **CHAPLAIN** or **LIEUTENANT** model only. While the bearer’s unit is not Battle‑shocked, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

**DEATHWING** model only. Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, the bearer can use this Enhancement. If it does, remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. While a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is within 6" of this model, you can re-roll Battle-shock and Leadership tests taken for that unit.
**ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of those weapons by 1.

**DEATHWING** model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.
**RAVENWING** model only. You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy **CHARACTER** unit within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test when they do. In addition, each time this model destroys an enemy **CHARACTER** model with a melee attack, you gain 1CP.

fluff.en: Asmodai is the Dark Angels’ most successful Interrogator-Chaplain. Relentless and humourless, in battle he incites his battle-brothers’ fighting spirit to reach new heights, rendering them unstoppable killing machines by chanting litanies of hate with unshakeable belief.

At the start of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, you gain 1CP.

Models in the bearer’s unit have a 4+ invulnerable save. In addition, once per battle, in any phase, the bearer can summon a Watcher in the Dark. When it does, until the end of the phase, models in the bearer’s unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Supreme Grand Master Azrael is a beacon of inspiration to those who follow him, and is paid enormous respect for his ability as a strategist. A masterful commander, he quickly grasps changing battlefield realities and orchestrates his forces to maximum advantage. In the fray, Azrael decapitates foes with every strike of the Sword of Secrets.

description.en: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, if a Critical Hit is scored, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

Each time a melee attack is allocated to this model, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to a maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

wargear.en: None

fluff.en: Grand Master Belial is a warrior born – a killer whose skill in battle has always stood out, even amongst his post-human brethren. For all his ability he is a staunch perfectionist, chastising himself for every perceived weakness. In battle he wields the Sword of Silence, an obsidian Chapter relic that seems to swallow nearby sound.

description.en: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 8" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.
Each time an attack is allocated to a model in this unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

Once per battle, in any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model in this unit, this unit can summon a Watcher in the Dark. When it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
If a **CHARACTER** unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **TERMINATOR SQUAD**, it can be attached to this unit instead.

**The Knight Master is equipped with:** great weapon of the Unforgiven.
**Every Deathwing Knight is equipped with:** mace of absolution.

wargear.en: This unit can be equipped with 1 Watcher in the Dark.
All Deathwing Knights in this unit can each have their mace of absolution replaced with 1 power weapon.
The Knight Master’s great weapon of the Unforgiven can be replaced with 1 relic weapon.

fluff.en: Deathwing Knights are the Chapter’s ultimate death-dealers, their strikes breaking the enemy’s back or ensuring the capture of errant Fallen. Equipped with heirloom wargear such as crackling blades or incense-wreathed maces, they teleport into the heart of the thickest fighting, led by Knight Masters who lead them unerringly to victory.

instruction.en: This unit can be equipped with 1 Watcher in the Dark.
The Knight Master’s great weapon of the Unforgiven can be replaced with 1 relic weapon.
All Deathwing Knights in this unit can each have their mace of absolution replaced with 1 power weapon.

description.en: At the start of the battle, you can set up one Teleport Homer token for this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is not in your opponent’s deployment zone. If you do, once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, but when resolving that Stratagem, you must set this unit up within 3" horizontally of that token and not within 8" horizontally of any enemy models. That token is then removed.

Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack’s Ballistic Skill or Weapon Skill characteristics and/or to the Hit roll. In addition, each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets your Oath of Moment target (see Codex: Space Marines), add 1 to the Hit roll.

Once per battle, in any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** model in this unit, this unit can summon a Watcher in the Dark. When it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
If a **CHARACTER** unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a **TERMINATOR SQUAD**, it can be attached to this unit instead.

**The Deathwing Sergeant is equipped with:** storm bolter; power weapon.
**Every Deathwing Terminator is equipped with:** storm bolter; power fist.

wargear.en: This unit can be equipped with 1 Watcher in the Dark.

For every 5 models in this unit, 1 Deathwing Terminator can replace its storm bolter with one of the following: ◦ 1 assault cannon ◦ 1 heavy flamer ◦ 1 plasma cannon ◦ 1 storm bolter and 1 cyclone missile launcher (this model’s storm bolter cannot be replaced)
Any number of Deathwing Terminators can each have their power fist replaced with 1 chainfist.

fluff.en: After deploying rapidly on to the battlefield via blazing teleport strike or within the armoured hull of a mighty transport, Deathwing Terminator Squads pour fire into their enemies with storm bolters and devastating heavy weapons, or engage them in brutal melee, tearing them apart with power fists and howling chainfists.

fluff.en: Ezekiel is Grand Master of Librarians. As a master of Interromancy, his warp-whispers shred the sanity of his enemies. His blade, known as Traitor’s Bane, was forged to slay those who turn against the Emperor. It is a formidable force weapon rumoured to entrap forever the souls of the Fallen.

fluff.en: Wielding Calibanite greatswords with breathtaking skill, wreathed in the incense smoke of their braziers of judgement, the Inner Circle Companions cut a crimson path through their foes. They are sinister warriors whether battling as ally or enemy, for they fight in silence save for the whine of their armour servos and the crunch of their blades through flesh and bone.

fluff.en: Boasting a larger chassis and anti-gravity engines, the Land Speeder Vengeance mounts heavier weaponry than other Land Speeders, and is thus fitted with a plasma storm battery. In battle, its crew use this potent weapon to deliver devastating firepower while keeping pace with the swift hunt of the Ravenwing.

fluff.en: Master Lazarus wields his sword, Enmity’s Edge, with all the martial skill expected of a Dark Angels Company Master. In even the most ferocious fighting he exhibits a calm demeanour, maintaining composure despite the hatred for witches smouldering in his breast, while giving masterful orders that have yielded great victories.

description.en: At the start of your Command phase, select two Primarch of the First Legion abilities. Until the start of your next Command phase, this model has those abilities.
Each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.
While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES INFANTRY** units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is **unengaged**, you can use this ability. If you do:
• Place this unit in **strategic reserves**.
• This unit can make an **ingress move** in your next Movement phase (including in your first turn).
While a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.
While a friendly **ADEPTUS ASTARTES** unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds.
If this model is in your army, it must be your **WARLORD**.

With the immense blade, Fealty, the Primarch cleaves apart the most heinous of monstrosities, while the Emperor’s Shield erupts in blazes of light and force in response to savage blows.

Able to excel both in ground attacks and breakneck dogfights, these potent fighter craft provide versatile and blisteringly swift fire support wherever it is most desperately required.

They speed towards the foe, swinging their corvus hammers with such force that the spiked weapons puncture the thickest armour and lay low the greatest prey.

At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, select one **visible** enemy unit (excluding **AIRCRAFT**/**Lone Operative** units) within 24" of this unit. That enemy unit is **slowed** until the end of your opponent’s next Movement phase:
• While a unit is **slowed**, in your opponent’s Movement phase, when that unit is **selected to move**, unless that unit **remains stationary**, roll one D6:
• On a 1-4, that unit suffers D3 **mortal wounds** and that unit has -2" **M**.
• On a 5-6, that unit suffers 2D3 **mortal wounds** and that unit has -3" **M**.’
While this model has 1-3 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

It is aided in this role by armaments dating back to the Dark Age of Technology, such as the empirically charged rift cannon and the sinister stasis bomb, that trammels victims in a zone of slowed time.

Through the artifice of the Dark Angels, these energies are amplified and used to obscure those battle-brothers near to the Darkshroud from enemy sight.
